allow: PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS wasel_project2 CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\wasel -my project\(2\)\\app" -Recurse | Where-Object {!$_.PSIsContainer} | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\wasel -my project\(2\)\\", ""\) })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\wasel -my project\(2\)\\database" -Recurse | Where-Object {!$_.PSIsContainer} | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\wasel -my project\(2\)\\", ""\) })
